changes.feedbackRef: intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → Eastweald line; gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F1 lines 3-17; gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F3 could hear
changes.before: Eastweald had the insolence to look healthy. / The wrongness ran under that polish. / She could hear Sylvanas asking how long everything would take.
changes.after: Eastweald looked healthy in a way that felt insolent. / The wrongness reached her through the reins first... / Sylvanas would have asked how long everything would take.

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F1 lines 41-53; F4 routine/restatement cluster; F6 paragraph line 49; negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → workers/prisoners
changes.before: Workers. Actual workers, not prisoners shoved through an ugly theater. / Barov money. Barov order. / Enchanted stones in the walls, then. Imported work. Old money.
changes.after: Workers, busy and fed... / Money showed here in mended cloth... / Enchanted stones warmed the walls. Imported work, and old money paying for it.

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F2 His smile held; F3 as though; F6 paragraph line 53
changes.before: His hands rested on the chair arms in easy silence. No ink under the nails. No callus at the thumb. A man used to signing orders... / "Lady Proudmoore," he said, as though... / His smile held.
changes.after: No ink stained his nails... Whatever labor his house required, none of it ran through those hands. / "Lady Proudmoore," he said in a tone polished for expected guests. / His smile stayed in place, though the corners tightened.

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F1/F3/F5 interview cluster lines 75-139; narrator-seep-guide.md → Alexei verdict fragments; negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → not ours / noticed
changes.before: That was the first true break in him. Tiny. Brief. / He did not flinch. Better than the guard. / One corner of her mouth tried for a smile... / That is their burden, not ours. / ...noticed the lamps had burned low.
changes.after: That was the first break in him... / He held still, which already put him a step ahead of the guard outside. / Jandice almost smiled, then checked herself. / That burden is theirs. / ...until the lamps burned low.

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F5 main-house access scene lines 51-149
changes.before: "Permit?" ... "I would be a poor host if I showed you only tea."
changes.after: "Permit?" ... "I would rather have the inspection where I can watch it."

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F1 lines 164-188; F7 Easy extraction; intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → watchful pressure; negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → landing cluster KEEP preserved
changes.before: The lake carried a chemical cold. Preservation. Minerals... / Easy extraction ends here, she thought. / Jaina felt the watchful pressure adjust... / Students did not cluster on the landing.
changes.after: The lake carried a chemical cold, mineral-heavy and stale... / Easy extraction ended there. / The pressure shifted, marked her, and passed the message inward through the lattice. / A single porter in dark clothes waited...

changes.feedbackRef: narrator-seep-guide.md → Antonidas seminar marks; gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F4 routine restatement
changes.before: Antonidas's seminar marks. His school, carried forward in another hand. / Routine was the point. Nobody bothered to hide what they were doing.
changes.after: Antonidas's seminar marks, his school carried forward in another hand. / They worked in plain sight, which told her more than any hidden room would have.

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F1 archive-reading lines 247-279; F3 Jaina did not look up; narrator-seep-guide.md → Different hands / story in the chalk; F6 paragraph line 279
changes.before: Different hands, same lineage. / Host response... Incomplete, still. The final waking step absent. / Jaina did not look up. / The story had been in the chalk all along. / References cut short. Samples transferred inward...
changes.after: The same notational spine... / Still incomplete. The final waking step was missing. / Jaina kept her eyes on the ledger. / She should have recognized the lineage sooner. / The lower floors were everywhere in the ledger even when they went unnamed...

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F2 composure tightened; intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → building / weight in the stone; narrator-seep-guide.md → omitted route; gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F7 private access close
changes.before: Jandice's composure tightened. Enough to show the wall. / I found a building using Kirin Tor bones... / The care in it felt worse than disorder. / The weight in the stone said more... / Omitted route. Private access. Higher clearance...
changes.after: Jandice's mouth flattened, and the warmth went out of her eyes. / I found Kirin Tor method under all of this, holding up something uglier. / Order made the room worse. / Strained masonry and thickening wards told her more... / A private route, then, and clearance above what Jandice had admitted.

changes.feedbackRef: intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → page after page / building told its master; gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F3/F7 Antonidas call cluster; narrator-seep-guide.md → relief and anger pause; negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → right in every way
changes.before: Page after page drove toward the same answer. / He would be right in every way that did not solve the problem fast enough. / The answering silence carried relief and anger... / If the building is what you think it is...
changes.after: Page after page pointed to the same answer. / He would be right, and still too slow for the problem in front of her. / Antonidas said nothing for a beat. / If the place is what you think it is, its wards have already told the master you are there.

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F5 guest-room theory-bonding scene; narrator-seep-guide.md → Being understood hit Jandice; intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → The Council saw the gate
changes.before: "Then let's stop pretending..." / Being understood hit Jandice hard enough to show. / The Council saw the gate and declared the field forbidden...
changes.after: "Then stop pretending..." / The words landed. Jandice went still for half a breath... / The men who sit on the Council saw the gate and forbade the field...

changes.feedbackRef: gpt-5-prose-issues.md → F7 The next move / Of course it did / final door close; narrator-seep-guide.md → Of course it did / finality line; negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → No slam. No lock grinding...
changes.before: There should have been triumph in that. Instead her stomach tightened. The next move belonged to someone else now. / ... Of course it did. / No slam. No lock grinding into place. Just wood meeting stone...
changes.after: Her stomach tightened instead. Someone else had the next move. / Jaina had expected that much. / Wood met stone, quiet and final.
